overview: I rebuilt and stress-tested multi-agent versions of my Week 1-3 tools, discovering that 3x cost premiums are trivial at low volume but become $365K/year at scale. I added resilience patterns, profiling, and optimization to cut my ROI Analyzer from $0.15 to $0.05 per run.

keyPoints.title: Multi-agent Feature Spec Generator costs 3x more ($0.15 vs $0.05)
Shared state context beats parameter-passing for agent coordination
Tool-enabled agents give correct answers; toolless agents hallucinate ROI
5 failure patterns map to 5 resilience strategies in production
Optimization cut ROI Analyzer cost 67%: $0.15 to $0.05 per run
